I have teenagers who are good walkers and we enjoyed hiking up Russian Hill and down Lombard St. It’s a workout, but something you won’t see anywhere else. 2 of my boys really enjoyed it. 2 tolerated it. With moody teens, that is definitely considered a win!  Might be hectic to drive down the hill. A fair amount of traffic while we were there. No problem walking down, other than the obvious hill.

Had to visit the famous Lombard Street whilst in SF! Its smaller in real life we thought! Still fun to see, we got the cable car to the top and then walked down. Probably better if you get to drive down it but glad we got to see it in real life regardless
One of the attractions of SF is to walk this zigzagging street, we did it both by car and on foot. It is interesting as far as you have nothing like it in the world.
